homepage.twinSupportBody: Expert guidance across time zones, OEM programs, and field support—from deployment to uptime.
homepage.twinStoryBody: Why we build collaborative robots—and how Roooll shows up for operators, integrators, and partners.

items.q1: We already run PLCs and vision—no dedicated robotics team. How long from unboxing an r-Lite - C for pick-and-place to a running first path?
items.a1: r-Lite - C integrates the control cabinet in the base—compact footprint for bench and line-side cells. Tune via Web App, teach pendant, or mobile; host interfaces include TCP/IP, digital I/O, and Modbus TCP/RTU. For the robot itself—unbox, mount, and run a first taught pick-and-place path—experienced teams often finish in a few hours, typically within one business day. Full station bring-up with fixtures, vision, and PLC/MES handshaking usually takes longer (often 1–3 business days, project-dependent).
items.q2: We need ~3 kg precision assembly—when is r-Lite the right call versus r-Core or r-Max?
items.a2: Choose r-Lite for the smallest integrated footprint and light payloads (3 kg rated class on standard variants). Step up to r-Core when you need higher repeatability or a 5 kg class cell without growing the arm. r-Max covers long-reach palletizing—use the comparison tool if two lines overlap.
items.q3: The site runs Siemens PLC + MES with quick-change grippers—can r-Lite join the existing bus?
items.a3: Yes—native TCP/IP, I/O, and Modbus TCP/RTU for mainstream PLC and MES stacks. No rip-and-replace. The tool flange follows ISO 9409-1; Roooll EOAT and qualified third-party grippers, vacuum, and quick-change modules are supported.
items.q4: Three shifts, 6,000+ hours per year—will r-Lite joints and reducers last?
items.a4: Roooll r-Series uses industrial servos and precision reducers with rigorous QC before shipment. Core drive systems carry a 2-year limited warranty. Under standard duty, the arm is designed for continuous long-run operation.
items.q5: We need white-label export—custom housing and teach UI. What is MOQ for r-Lite programs?
items.a5: Roooll offers flexible OEM/ODM on r-Series lines—branding, colorways, and EOAT co-development. Small-batch programs are negotiable (often from a few dozen units for exterior and UI customization). Standard specs ship within 3–5 business days after payment confirmation.
items.q6: We ship to Europe and Southeast Asia—is compliance documentation available, and can spares keep up overseas?
items.a6: Roooll R-Series is designed to meet RoHS and widely referenced cobot safety benchmarks; export documentation can be supplied per project. Global support with professional response within 12 hours; overseas spares cover core joint modules and common EOAT.
items.q7: What does “integrated control cabinet” mean on r-Lite - C?
items.a7: The motion controller, power stage, and I/O live inside the robot base—no separate cabinet on the floor. You still pair external fieldbus options when the variant requires an external cabinet; see the controller row on the lineup or comparison pages.
items.q8: How is r-Lite - C different from r-Core - C if both integrate the controller?
items.a8: r-Lite targets the lightest 3 kg class with the most compact cell layout. r-Core - C adds a 4–5 kg class envelope, tighter repeatability options, and a broader set of industrial variants—pick by payload, reach, and repeatability rows in the spec table.
items.q9: Which grippers and fixtures fit the r-Lite flange?
items.a9: ISO 9409-1 tool flange across r-Lite variants. Roooll-published grippers and fixtures on the Accessories hub are sized for r-Series pairing; third-party EOAT is supported—list your interface and cycle time in an inquiry.

items.q1: We need high payload and long reach for palletizing—how quickly can r-Ultra go from install to first production path?
items.a1: r-Ultra ships as a heavy-duty r-Series arm paired with an external control cabinet (see Accessories for cabinet specs). Typical single-station commissioning—mechanical install, cabinet wiring, first program—often 2–5 business days depending on fieldbus and EOAT integration.
items.q2: When should we choose r-Ultra instead of r-Max?
items.a2: Compare rated payload, reach, and repeatability rows side by side. r-Max leads on long-reach palletizing in the 16–20 kg class; r-Ultra covers the top of the r-Series payload envelope when the application needs maximum capacity or a specific ultra variant from the catalog.
items.q3: Can r-Ultra integrate with our PLC, MES, and fieldbus stack?
items.a3: External control cabinets support TCP/IP, I/O, Modbus TCP/RTU, and optional industrial Ethernet (Profinet, EtherNet/IP, EtherCAT, CC-Link IE Field Basic—per cabinet model). The tool flange is ISO 9409-1 for Roooll and third-party EOAT.
items.q4: Three shifts, 6,000+ hours per year—are r-Ultra drives and reducers built for that duty?
items.a4: Industrial servos, precision reducers, and pre-shipment QC are standard on r-Series heavy lines. Core drive systems carry a 2-year limited warranty; continuous operation is the design target under standard duty.
items.q5: We need OEM branding on a heavy cobot line—what batch sizes and lead times are realistic?
items.a5: OEM/ODM covers housing, colorways, teach UI, and industry EOAT. Small-batch r-Ultra / r-Max programs are negotiable; standard configurations ship within 3–5 business days after payment confirmation—custom timelines are fixed in contract.
items.q6: Export to EU and Southeast Asia—compliance docs and overseas spares?
items.a6: RoHS-aligned design and cobot safety benchmarks; regional compliance packages per project. Global support within 12 hours; spares for joints, control components, and common EOAT with remote diagnostics.
items.q7: Does r-Ultra always use an external control cabinet?
items.a7: Yes—r-Ultra pairs with Roooll external control cabinets (not a base-integrated - C layout). Cabinet choice drives fieldbus, power, and install footprint; see Accessories → Control Cabinets and the comparison controller row.
items.q8: Which end-effectors are realistic at r-Ultra payloads?
items.a8: ISO 9409-1 flange with payload-rated grippers, vacuum, and custom tooling—verify mass, CG, and cycle limits against the variant payload row. Roooll fixtures and third-party EOAT are supported; share your tool CAD in an inquiry.
items.q9: Can we compare r-Ultra against r-Max or r-Core on this site?
items.a9: Use Side-by-Side Comparison to lock any three catalog variants—including joint axes and controller pairing—or run the Product Advisor for a guided shortlist with an inquiry draft.

organization.description: Roooll designs and supplies r-Series collaborative robots (cobots) and robotic arm accessories for manufacturing, medical lab, retail, and OEM deployment.

footnotes.a: 7+ Years of Proven Reliability. Beyond distributing robotic arms, we provide years of accumulated technical expertise. Every R-Series cobot undergoes a "Zero-Defect" quality control process before delivery, ensuring peak performance right out of the box.

Always Connected, 24/7. Our expert team is available across time zones to provide technical consultation. Whether it's a business inquiry or complex technical support, we guarantee a professional response within 12 hours.

Efficiency in Motion. Standard specifications are scheduled for shipment within 3-5 business days after payment confirmation. For large-scale deployments or bespoke orders, delivery timelines are precisely defined in the sales contract.

Accuracy in Every Millimeter. Our repeatability of ±0.02mm is measured under strictly controlled laboratory conditions. We provide performance evaluations tailored to your specific payload, speed, and environmental requirements.

Tailored to Your Ambition (OEM/ODM). We turn your vision into reality. Beyond our standard R-Series, we offer deep enterprise-level customization, brand integration, and collaborative development of industry-specific end-effectors.

Your Production, Protected. Core drive systems (motors, reducers) and control architectures are covered by a 2-year limited warranty. With our global response mechanism, we ensure your production line remains efficient and worry-free.

Designed for global deployment. R-Series products align with RoHS and widely referenced international cobot safety benchmarks; compliance and test documentation for your target market can be supplied per project. We advocate responsible manufacturing and delivery.

opener.title: Smart Manufacturing.
opener.subtitle: Put repeat, low-value tasks on cobots—so your team owns quality, changeovers, and craft.

story.ariaLabel: Smart manufacturing collaborative robotic arm value story

step1.title: Keep lines earning—not operators waiting.
step1.body: Roooll collaborative arms take on tending, fastening, and transfer—the repeatable beats that drain shifts. Compact cells, fast teach, redeploy when SKUs change. One playbook for CNC doors, assembly fixtures, and welding bays—machines stay productive, people stay in control.

step2.title: What cobots change on your floor.
step2.intro: High mix, tight takt, limited floor space—cells need speed, repeatability, and flexibility—not more fencing and months of integration.

items.title: Live the same day
items.body: Roll in, teach waypoints, validate cycle time—without rebuilding the cell for every SKU.

items.title: Repeatable cadence
items.body: Torque, paths, and pick-place stay consistent—less variation, fewer escapes.

items.title: Compact flexibility
items.body: Fit beside guarding; swap programs and fixtures when the mix changes—not headcount.

items.title: Welding assist: stable paths, skilled judgment
items.body: Heavy automation for every part isn't practical. Cobots hold repeatable paths while welders own quality, changeovers, and exceptions.

items.eyebrow: Assembly takt · Torque you can trust
items.title: Screw driving: consistent torque, steady cadence
items.body: Manual fastening drifts with fatigue. Cobots run the program—change SKU, change the recipe, not the line.

items.title: CNC tending: compact load/unload across shifts
items.body: Skilled operators shouldn't spend shifts at the door. Compact arms tend inside the cell—people focus on QC and changeovers.

compare.title: A clearer way to run the cell
compare.before: Operators tethered to CNC doors, welding booths, and fastener tools.
compare.after: Repeatable tending, fastening, and transfer—while people focus on quality and changeovers.

items.label: Global technical response—clear direction when a line is down.
Limited warranty on core drives—motors, reducers, and control architecture.
Standard-config shipment after payment confirmation—pilots don't wait a quarter.

items.title: One r-Series playbook, many cells
items.body: From r-Lite to r-Ultra—same teach flows, flange, and ecosystem. Pilot one cell, scale without a new stack.

items.title: Integrate what you already run
items.body: TCP/IP, I/O, Modbus for PLC/MES handshakes; Roooll and qualified third-party EOAT paired to your cycle.

items.title: Global support, line stays up
items.body: Cross-time-zone engineering with a clear response within 12 hours; spares and a 2-year warranty on core components.

privacy.metaDescription: How Roooll collects, uses, and protects personal data from Cobot website visitors, inquiry forms, analytics, and marketing tags.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Roooll (“we”) operates roooll.com and related services for collaborative robot (Cobot) information and sales inquiries. This policy explains what we collect, why, and your choices.

sections.heading: Data we collect
paragraphs: Inquiry form: name, business email, industry, and message you submit voluntarily.
Technical logs: IP address, browser type, and page paths processed by our hosting provider for security and reliability.
Analytics (only if you accept cookies): pseudonymous usage data via Google Analytics 4.
Marketing tags (only if you accept cookies): LinkedIn Insight Tag may set cookies to measure B2B ad performance.

sections.heading: How we use data
paragraphs: Respond to product and quotation requests.
Improve site content, Cobot selector tools, and performance.
Comply with law and prevent abuse (including rate limits and spam filtering on inquiry APIs).

sections.heading: Legal bases (EEA/UK visitors)
paragraphs: Contract / pre-contractual steps when you request a quote.
Legitimate interests for site security and aggregated analytics with consent.
Consent for non-essential cookies and marketing measurement tags.

sections.heading: Sharing & retention
paragraphs: Inquiry email is delivered via Resend to our sales mailbox. Analytics data is processed by Google; LinkedIn processes tag data under its policies.
We retain inquiry records as long as needed for sales follow-up and legal obligations, then delete or anonymize.

sections.heading: Your rights
paragraphs: You may request access, correction, or deletion of personal data by emailing info@roooll.com.
You can withdraw analytics consent anytime via Cookie settings in the site footer.

story.metaDescription: Mission, engineering principles, transparency, and cobot stewardship from the founders of Roooll.
story.openingBody: Roooll builds collaborative robots where mechanical rigor meets software anyone can master—on the line, in the lab, and alongside the people who keep industry moving.
story.originBody: We began by addressing a fundamental tension: factories and labs demand absolute repeatability, yet deployment shouldn't depend on a rare few. Roooll closes that gap—with arms precise enough for real work, and intuitive enough to deploy instantly.

modular.title: Modular by design.
modular.body: Form factors and tooling share a single mental model. Integrate once, deploy across any cell.

deploy.title: Quick to deploy.
deploy.body: Transition from bench to production seamlessly with clean interfaces, exhaustive documentation, and dedicated support.

operate.title: Easy to operate.
operate.body: Web-native control and open SDKs. Power to the operators, not the gatekeepers.

story.peopleBody: We mandate fair labor across our supply chain, ensure absolute safety on actual workshop floors, and design technology to augment human judgment—not replace it. For us, human rights shape how we choose partners and build workflows.
story.planetBody: Crafted with RoHS-compliant materials, responsibly sourced components, and durable mechanics engineered for service—not landfills. We provide verifiable compliance data per project, building trust on facts, not slogans.
story.closingTitle: If this standard matches yours, let's build together.
story.closingBody: Explore the r-Series lineup—or share the automation challenges you're looking to solve.

support.logoAlt: Roooll brand mark on support page.

manualCard.body: Product manuals, quick-start guides, and safety documentation. Leave your email and our team will follow up with download access.
manualCard.success: Thank you. Our team will email you download access within 12 hours.

distributorCard.title: Distributor only
distributorCard.body: Channel pricing, co-marketing assets, and partner onboarding—for authorized Roooll distributors.

service.heroBody: From day one on the factory floor to years of high-yield production, our support is integrated into every robot. Expert guidance across time zones, tailored engineering, and relentless uptime, guaranteed.

global.title: Always within reach.
global.body: Real-time expertise, across every time zone. From initial deployment to complex troubleshooting, our engineering team ensures a definitive resolution within 12 hours.

bespoke.title: Your vision. Our engineering.
bespoke.body: Go beyond the standard catalog. We partner with you on OEM/ODM development, white-label branding, and application-specific end-effectors tailored exactly to your workflow.

deployment.title: Ready when you are.
deployment.body: High availability, zero waiting. Standard configurations ship within 3 to 5 business days. For volume deployments and custom solutions, deadlines are transparent and locked from day one.

warranty.title: Two years. Zero guesswork.
warranty.body: Every core component—motors, reducers, and control architecture—is covered by an industry-leading two-year warranty. Backed by a responsive global network dedicated to keeping your line running.

preventive.title: Stay ahead of downtime.
preventive.body: Planned health checks and guided maintenance catch wear before it stops your line. Remote diagnostics pair with on-site inspections when your program needs them—so surprises stay rare.

lifetime.title: Built for years, not quarters.
lifetime.body: Your deployment does not end when warranty paperwork does. Regional spare paths, repair programs, and engineering support stay available as your cell matures—keeping earlier r-Series arms productive alongside new installs.

software.title: Evolution, automatically.
software.body: Your hardware stays ahead of the curve. Benefit from continuous firmware updates, OS optimizations, and open-access SDK enhancements that unlock new capabilities over time.

spareParts.title: Minimized downtime. Maximized trust.
spareParts.body: Critical components shouldn't wait. We maintain dedicated regional stock for motors and joint modules, ensuring rapid global dispatch to keep your production moving.

resources.title: Everything you need, instantly.
resources.body: Skip the queue and access our comprehensive repository. Instantly download production-ready 3D CAD files, simulation tools, programming guides, and detailed user manuals.

scroll_film.section_aria: Immersive r-Lite cobot story: advantages, detail views, blueprint, and applications

advantages.title: Mass, reduced.
advantages.subtitle: Space, reclaimed.
advantages.body: {{payload}} rated payload in an ~{{weight}} self-contained chassis. By integrating the entire controller directly into the die-cast base, r-Lite delivers agile {{reach}} reach with no external cabinet clutter—zero wasted floor space on a {{footprint}} footprint, with straightforward acquisition and spares and less integration overhead.

advantages.title: {{repeatability}} repeatability.
advantages.subtitle: Precision, shift after shift.
advantages.body: Micro-engineered consistency. Every joint is calibrated to sustain {{repeatability}} pose accuracy under rated load and motion—keeping your high-tolerance lines moving flawlessly across shifts.

advantages.title: Intuitive teaching.
advantages.subtitle: Deployed in minutes.
advantages.body: Automation without the learning curve. {{description}} Guide the arm by hand and program intricate paths through an intuitive browser-based Web App on any mobile terminal—or a 10.1" teach pendant. Drag, save, and run.

flange.title: Flange: where tooling meets the process
flange.body: A precision end flange gives fixtures, quick changers, and process modules a stable handshake—one less re-teach per changeover.

base.title: Base: low center, integrated "heart"
base.body: Controller and structure as one improve damping and rigidity, with fewer cables and cleaner installs—ideal for compact cobot cells and mobile platforms.

scroll_film.svg_kicker: The language your shop floor already speaks.
scroll_film.svg_caption: Scroll to dissect the architecture. The official vector technical drawing wipes in as you scroll—envelope, joint limits, and control interfaces for mechanical and controls teams.
scroll_film.scenario_caption: From drawing to duty: r-Lite cobot arms in manufacturing, lab automation, and medical-assist workcells.
scroll_film.scenario_image_alt: r-Lite collaborative robot cobot product scene, showing integrated collaborative robotic arm form factor in a typical deployment.

flange_strip.title: Advanced safety
flange_strip.body: Collision-free collaboration. Armed with 10 levels of real-time adjustable torque sensitivity, r-Lite senses the gentlest human touch and stops instantly—safeguarding operators while reducing reliance on restrictive safety fences.

flange_strip.title: Ecosystem ready
flange_strip.body: Standardized at the tip. Designed around a universal ISO 9409-1 mechanical flange, r-Lite interfaces out of the box with global ecosystems of smart grippers, vacuum tools, and advanced vision systems.

flange_strip.title: Disruptive ROI
flange_strip.body: Vertical integration keeps acquisition and spares straightforward, so representative cells can earn back labor and integration spend sooner (shift model and tooling dependent).

flange_strip.title: Safety by design
flange_strip.body: Engineered for continuous uptime. Designed to align with RoHS and widely referenced international cobot safety benchmarks; export compliance documentation available per project. A resilient aluminum-steel architecture built for non-stop industrial utilization.

scroll_film.blueprint_intro_body: No proprietary black boxes. Every joint envelope, reach limit, and control interface is openly documented. Native ROS/ROS2 driver frameworks and open SDKs are available before unboxing—integration measured in hours, not weeks.
scroll_film.application_title: Built for how you actually deploy.
scroll_film.application_body: From bench validation to steady-state production, the same control vocabulary, safety model, and teach flows travel with you—so operators learn once, then scale with confidence.

application_cards.caption: CNC machine tending — 24/7 spindle utilization. Relieve operators from repetitive, hazardous machine tending. r-Lite’s compact ~{{weight}} profile and {{reach}} reach adapt inside tight CNC enclosures—running across three shifts while enduring cutting fluids and industrial debris.

Precision assembly and screwdriving — flawless torque control. Pair with standard ISO tools to automate delicate electronic and mechanical assembly. r-Lite provides constant force monitoring to reduce over-tightening and thread damage, holding {{repeatability}} consistency under rated load.

Smart pick-and-place — frictionless desktop palletizing. Streamline packaging and kitting workflows. With agile {{reach}} reach, r-Lite tracks, sorts, and stacks parts up to 3 kg rated (5 kg peak) with fluid accuracy—maximizing throughput while reducing human error.

scroll_film.r_family_body: Whatever your line demands, the R-family delivers. From ultra-compact workstation companions to robust, high-payload industrial arms, Roooll r-series spans a complete spectrum of reach and payload configurations—one safety story, one tooling mindset, one upgrade path.
scroll_film.tail_subtitle: Bench, line, or lab—one arm, one story.

r_ultra.metaTitleFocus: Heavy-Payload Cobot Robotic Arm — r-Ultra & r-Max
r_ultra.metaDescription: r-Ultra 30kg flagship and r-Max 16–20kg long-reach cobots (to 1854mm)—collaborative robotic arms for palletizing, handling, CNC tending, and end-of-line transfer. Compare r-Series specs.
r_ultra.immersive_glb_alt: Roooll r-Ultra collaborative robot, 30kg payload, ±0.1mm repeatability, 1402mm reach; 6-axis cobot arm for heavy handling and palletizing.

scenario_subnav.brand_top_aria: Roooll brand strip on r-Ultra immersive page
scenario_subnav.slogan: From blueprint to bench — strength for your next cell.

scroll_film.section_aria: Immersive r-Ultra cobot story: advantages, detail views, blueprint, and applications

advantages.title: 30 kg rated.
advantages.subtitle: 1402 mm reach.
advantages.body: {{payload}} nominal payload and {{reach}} reach in a ~{{weight}} industrial cobot built for palletizing, machine tending, and end-of-line transfer—fewer stacked machines, fence layers, and integration rework than a traditional heavy cell. {{tcpSpeed}} TCP and a {{footprint}} base footprint sized for real factory floors.

advantages.title: {{repeatability}} repeatability.
advantages.subtitle: Don't compromise on accuracy.
advantages.body: Hardware micro-engineered for {{repeatability}} pose repeatability under rated load and motion—turning heavy mechanics into a dependable node in high-throughput manufacturing stacks.

advantages.title: Plug. Play.
advantages.subtitle: Program.
advantages.body: Instantly accessible via any standard mobile browser, teach pendant, or your line's industrial network. r-Ultra democratizes heavy automation with drag-and-drop paths plus native C++, Python, and ROS/ROS2 pipelines—ready for advanced integrators.

flange.title: Flange: where tooling meets the process
flange.body: A precision end flange gives fixtures, quick changers, and process modules a stable handshake—one less re-teach per changeover.

base.title: Base: engineered for heavy-duty uptime
base.body: A rugged aluminum-steel structure and {{footprint}} mounting footprint deliver the stiffness heavy payloads demand—while keeping integration paths familiar to controls teams.

scroll_film.svg_caption: Scroll to inspect developer documentation. Vector envelopes and joint limits wipe in as you scroll—align mechanical, controls, and software before metal hits the floor.
scroll_film.scenario_caption: From drawing to duty: r-Ultra cobot arms in manufacturing, stamping, palletizing, and heavy-assembly workcells.
scroll_film.scenario_image_alt: r-Ultra collaborative robot cobot product scene, showing high-payload collaborative robotic arm form factor in a typical deployment.

flange_strip.title: ROS/ROS2 native
flange_strip.body: Architected for modern software environments. Out-of-the-box support for C++, Python, and full ROS/ROS2 driver frameworks—r-Ultra is a fully programmable node for advanced industrial automation pipelines.

flange_strip.title: ISO flange
flange_strip.body: Eliminate compatibility engineering. A standard ISO 9409-1 mechanical connection interfaces instantly with global ecosystems of smart grippers, custom end-effectors, and sensors.

flange_strip.title: Full-stack economics
flange_strip.body: When one flagship arm replaces multiple machines or a fenced setup, footprint, integration, and spares fold into a clearer TCO.

flange_strip.title: Collaborative safety
flange_strip.body: Designed to align with widely referenced international cobot safety standards. Ten built-in levels of reactive collision detection and a ruggedized aluminum-steel housing safeguard operators and production uptime; regional compliance documentation available per project.

scroll_film.blueprint_intro_body: We believe in total engineering transparency—from digital twin simulation files to open SDKs and ROS/ROS2 drivers. Your dev team can simulate, test, and run logic before hardware hits the floor, maximizing pipeline efficiency from day one.
scroll_film.application_body: Automate loading, palletizing, and transfer with a cobot sized for real inertia—same teach flows and safety model as the rest of the r-series, scaled for flagship payload.

application_cards.caption: High-speed CNC tending — optimize your machine cycles. Automate load/unload with high-precision part positioning. {{reach}} reach and {{payload}} rated payload let r-Ultra serve large enclosures—cutting idle spindle time across three uninterrupted shifts.

Palletizing and heavy transfer — autonomous consistency at scale. Deploy r-Ultra for repetitive pick, place, and stack paths. With {{tcpSpeed}} TCP and fluid, high-resolution motion, paths track complex boundaries—clean, human-error-free end-of-line workflows.

Stamping and heavy assembly — smart force, industrial scale. Program paths with real-time torque and payload monitoring. r-Ultra maintains rigid orientation and force control on precision mechanical lines—{{repeatability}} repeatability under rated load.

scroll_film.r_family_body: Every payload. Every reach. Zero gaps in your stack. From micro desktop robots to high-capacity heavy lifters, Roooll r-series is engineered to eliminate gaps in your automation stack—if your factory has a use case, the R-family has the engineered answer.
